description: CompositionShirt and tie setPurple shirt made of a blended fabric, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest and a curved hemlinePurple tie made of 100% microfibre of length 141 cm, and has one loop with on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in placeFittingComfortWash careDry cleanThis purple shirt and tie combo from turtle is created for the sophisticated man. The soft blended fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering silhouette. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with formal pants and classy accessories.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
